question: how many lessons x week for a beginner?
content: It depends not only on your free time, but your expectations. If your goal is to become a professional, and you are still a teenager, you may need as many as 3 to 5 lessons per week, adding extra training hours and other body shape routines. If your goal is simply to be a better bowler, maybe one lesson per week with one extra training hour could work for you.
